visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female creator with long dark hair, wearing a beige puff-sleeve dress and a tan bucket hat, stands in the bakery section of a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She displays high arousal, gesturing with clenched fists and an excited facial expression while standing before stacks of pastries in clear plastic containers. (2) The camera transitions to a medium-full shot showing the creator pointing with both hands toward the rows of bread and pastry products. The industrial shelving and fluorescent warehouse lighting are visible in the background, creating a commercial environment. She picks up a specific box of braided pastries to show the texture. (3) A series of quick cuts focus on the product details, including a close-up of the price tag labeling the item as maple pecan pastries. The creator holds a single container close to the lens, smiling broadly while showcasing the golden-brown crust and nut toppings of the baked goods. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the creator and another young woman are seated at a table. They hold heart-shaped plates containing the pastries. Both women interact with the camera, taking bites, nodding enthusiastically, and giving thumbs-up gestures to indicate their approval of the flavor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 隱藏版. [Variety]: 很難搶. (2) [Slogan]: 迷你楓糖胡桃酥. (3) [Subtitle]: 終於讓我找到了. [Subtitle]: 迷你楓糖胡桃酥. (4) [Subtitle]: 198元. (5) [Variety]: 看到就要拿. (6) [Variety]: 超級無敵好吃. (7) [Variety]: 加熱之後更好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a beige puff-sleeve dress and a tan bucket hat; the other woman has long dark hair and wears a white top with lace details.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a large Costco warehouse with industrial shelving, stacks of bakery products, and fluorescent lighting. The second location is a brightly lit indoor home setting with a white table and heart-shaped plates.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice begins narration with rapid speech and high pitch variability, expressing excitement. An upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM with a steady percussion beat plays at a moderate volume. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of the product's price, while the speaker's tone remains cheerful and highly aroused. The BGM maintains its rhythmic intensity. (3) A 'pop' SFX is heard as visual emphasis text appears on screen. The narration is dense with very few structural pauses, maintaining a fast pacing. (4) A second female voice enters, creating a dynamic conversational interaction. The acoustic texture shifts slightly from the warehouse environment to a cleaner indoor studio tone. (5) Subtle crunching sounds occur during the taste-test portion, followed immediately by high-valence vocal exclamations of delight. A final 'ding' SFX marks the closing recommendation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Context -> Product Introduction -> Value Proposition -> Taste Test -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a specific bakery item from Costco, the 'Mini Maple Pecan Pastry'. It uses a highly energetic and persuasive tone to create a sense of urgency and desirability for the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, price mentioning, and strong positive verbal recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes classic social media 'find' tropes (hidden edition, hard to get) to drive viewer engagement and interest in warehouse shopping.
